name: Ошибки и разбор (Corp)
description: Ошибки парсинга и последние ошибки факта (JSON).

native.query: SELECT id, relates_to_id, error_code, left(message, 200) AS message, created_at FROM public.stg_parse_errors ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT relates_to_id, kind_code, clinic_name, processed_at FROM public.v_egisz_transactions_enriched WHERE status = 'error' ORDER BY processed_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50
